title: Three Sergeants of Bengal
writer: Víctor Andrés Catena, Fulvio Gicca Palli, Umberto Lenzi
actors: Richard Harrison, Wandisa Guida, Ugo Sasso
plot: This action-packed adventure/jungle film starts out when three British soldiers stationed in Malaysia are sent to Fort Madras to help the commandant fight off an elusive bandit who is terrorizing the countryside.
